entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2026.1.5
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • Pimcore Studio - Translations Split Screen for Data Objects by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3593
  • Lazy-mount document editor sidebar entries by @markus-moser in #3613
  • [Bug] Bricks should be saving class name and not id. by @vin0401 in #3619
  • Pass parentId when exporting selected assets as zip by @markus-moser in #3621
  • [Language selection] Improve language selection control by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3620
  • Add default values for classification store fields by @vin0401 in #3623
  • [LocalizedFields] Delete the provideSplitView field by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3624
  • [Bug] Fix delete progress bar for batched deletes by @markus-moser in #3625
  • [Website Setting Sorting] - adjust frontend to work with BE update by @xIrusux in #3630
  • [Documents] Editable config - clicking on "X" still saves config by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3626
  • Remove backdrop filter in idle state to reduce overall gpu usage by @vin0401 in #3631
  • [Application logger ] - use new endpoint file object permission by @xIrusux in #3632
  • Add advanced columns for object search by @vin0401 in #3638
  • Choosing language from dropdown closes advanced field by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3640
  • Introduce grouping for simple fields by @vin0401 in #3642
  • User can see language in split view without permission by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3639
  • Documentation fixes by @markus-moser in #3644
  • Fix preview item selection in grid config by @vin0401 in #3645
  • [Reports] integrate icon picker by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3648
  • [Reports] Align icons with Twemoji icon type by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3649
  • Add extension points to Workflow Transition Modal by @markus-moser in #3647
  • [Select] - improve remove selection by @xIrusux in #3652
  • [Bug] Fix timezone drift, respect locale + user date-time-locale across pickers by @markus-moser in #3646
  • 1689 alphabetic permission selection by @xIrusux in #3656
  • [Bug] Fix progress bar for batched tag and rewrite-references jobs by @markus-moser in #3637
  • Fix Select/Multiselect options provider labels for non-string values by @markus-moser in #3658
  • Infer optionsProviderType for legacy class definitions by @markus-moser in #3659
  • [Bug] Select: drive 'Clear selection' from allowClear by @markus-moser in #3665
  • [Editor Component] Add icon normalizer by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3662
  • [Tree] differentiate between delete folder otpions modals by @xIrusux in #3661
  • [Batch Edit] - add delete warn modal with accordion by @xIrusux in #3668
  • [Application] fix application logger timestamp sorting by @xIrusux in #3669
  • [DataObject] Persist cleared field values in the editor by @markus-moser in #3673
  • [DataObject] Grid filter & batch edit for dynamic select options by @markus-moser in #3674
  • [Application Logger] register Tab Application Logger to VariantTabManager by @xIrusux in #3679
  • [Perspective Editor] add translation to config name by @xIrusux in #3680
  • Fix: private per-user Mercure updates dropped on first login (cookie set after subscription) by @fashxp in #3676
  • Replace createStyles to reduce theme duplication in memory by @vin0401 in #3681
  • [DataObject] Dynamic select options provider in editor and grid by @markus-moser in #3672
  • [Grid Filter Tags] - open parent folder when filtering for child tag by @xIrusux in #3684
  • [Roles] - ensure workspaces for roles update when switching between users by @xIrusux in #3690
  • [Roles] - normalize data so saving and GET ing Role settings functions as expected by @xIrusux in #3688
  • [User] Fix user settings permanence by @xIrusux in #3692
  • Free retained memory after document tabs close by @vin0401 in #3695
  • Add createStyles to sdk exports by @vin0401 in #3696
  • Prepare 2025.4.5 release by @markus-moser in #3686
  • Prepare 2026.1.5 Release by @markus-moser in #3699

Full Changelog: v2026.1.4...v2026.1.5

entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2025.4.5
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • Pimcore Studio - Translations Split Screen for Data Objects by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3593
  • Lazy-mount document editor sidebar entries by @markus-moser in #3613
  • [Bug] Bricks should be saving class name and not id. by @vin0401 in #3619
  • Pass parentId when exporting selected assets as zip by @markus-moser in #3621
  • [Language selection] Improve language selection control by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3620
  • Add default values for classification store fields by @vin0401 in #3623
  • [LocalizedFields] Delete the provideSplitView field by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3624
  • [Bug] Fix delete progress bar for batched deletes by @markus-moser in #3625
  • [Website Setting Sorting] - adjust frontend to work with BE update by @xIrusux in #3630
  • [Documents] Editable config - clicking on "X" still saves config by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3626
  • Remove backdrop filter in idle state to reduce overall gpu usage by @vin0401 in #3631
  • [Application logger ] - use new endpoint file object permission by @xIrusux in #3632
  • Add advanced columns for object search by @vin0401 in #3638
  • Choosing language from dropdown closes advanced field by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3640
  • Introduce grouping for simple fields by @vin0401 in #3642
  • User can see language in split view without permission by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3639
  • Documentation fixes by @markus-moser in #3644
  • Fix preview item selection in grid config by @vin0401 in #3645
  • [Reports] integrate icon picker by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3648
  • [Reports] Align icons with Twemoji icon type by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3649
  • Add extension points to Workflow Transition Modal by @markus-moser in #3647
  • [Select] - improve remove selection by @xIrusux in #3652
  • [Bug] Fix timezone drift, respect locale + user date-time-locale across pickers by @markus-moser in #3646
  • 1689 alphabetic permission selection by @xIrusux in #3656
  • [Bug] Fix progress bar for batched tag and rewrite-references jobs by @markus-moser in #3637
  • Fix Select/Multiselect options provider labels for non-string values by @markus-moser in #3658
  • Infer optionsProviderType for legacy class definitions by @markus-moser in #3659
  • [Bug] Select: drive 'Clear selection' from allowClear by @markus-moser in #3665
  • [Editor Component] Add icon normalizer by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3662
  • [Tree] differentiate between delete folder otpions modals by @xIrusux in #3661
  • [Batch Edit] - add delete warn modal with accordion by @xIrusux in #3668
  • [Application] fix application logger timestamp sorting by @xIrusux in #3669
  • [DataObject] Persist cleared field values in the editor by @markus-moser in #3673
  • [DataObject] Grid filter & batch edit for dynamic select options by @markus-moser in #3674
  • [Application Logger] register Tab Application Logger to VariantTabManager by @xIrusux in #3679
  • [Perspective Editor] add translation to config name by @xIrusux in #3680
  • Fix: private per-user Mercure updates dropped on first login (cookie set after subscription) by @fashxp in #3676
  • Replace createStyles to reduce theme duplication in memory by @vin0401 in #3681
  • [DataObject] Dynamic select options provider in editor and grid by @markus-moser in #3672
  • [Grid Filter Tags] - open parent folder when filtering for child tag by @xIrusux in #3684
  • [Roles] - ensure workspaces for roles update when switching between users by @xIrusux in #3690
  • [Roles] - normalize data so saving and GET ing Role settings functions as expected by @xIrusux in #3688
  • [User] Fix user settings permanence by @xIrusux in #3692
  • Free retained memory after document tabs close by @vin0401 in #3695
  • Add createStyles to sdk exports by @vin0401 in #3696
  • Prepare 2025.4.5 release by @markus-moser in #3686

Full Changelog: v2025.4.4...v2025.4.5

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2025.4.5
entry.summary:
https://github.com/pimcore/studio-backend-bundle/issues?q=is%3Aclosed%20milestone%3A%222025.4.5%22

What's Changed

  • [Object Editor] - add viewports and languages to object editor preview by @lukmzig in #1851
  • [Bug]: Classification Store in Data Object does not fully fill up by @lukmzig in #1857
  • [Bug]: Explode returns a list of AdvancedValue. by @martineiber in #1858
  • [Improvement] Performance on batch-delete of objects is quite poor by @lukmzig in #1800
  • [Bug]: Error Message when searching users by @lukmzig in #1859
  • [Task]: Implement general rate limiting by @lukmzig in #1861
  • [Asset]: Add a filter to show only Unreferenced Assets. by @martineiber in #1860
  • [Bug] Round system.datetime grid filter to whole day by @markus-moser in #1864
  • [Improvement] Improve performance for Tag Assignment and Reference update batch jobs by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1815
  • [BUG] Children Grid Template button is dimmed by @lukmzig in #1868
  • [DataObject] Resolve nested field definitions for dynamic select options by @markus-moser in #1873

Full Changelog: v2025.4.4...v2025.4.5

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2026.1.5
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Object Editor] - add viewports and languages to object editor preview by @lukmzig in #1851
  • [Bug]: Classification Store in Data Object does not fully fill up by @lukmzig in #1857
  • [Bug]: Explode returns a list of AdvancedValue. by @martineiber in #1858
  • [Improvement] Performance on batch-delete of objects is quite poor by @lukmzig in #1800
  • [Bug]: Error Message when searching users by @lukmzig in #1859
  • [Task]: Implement general rate limiting by @lukmzig in #1861
  • [Asset]: Add a filter to show only Unreferenced Assets. by @martineiber in #1860
  • [Bug] Round system.datetime grid filter to whole day by @markus-moser in #1864
  • [Improvement] Improve performance for Tag Assignment and Reference update batch jobs by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1815
  • [BUG] Children Grid Template button is dimmed by @lukmzig in #1868
  • [DataObject] Resolve nested field definitions for dynamic select options by @markus-moser in #1873

Full Changelog: v2026.1.4...v2026.1.5

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 2026.1.5
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Task]: Add DependencyTargetsChangedMessage to Dependency Dao by @martineiber in #19156
  • [Bug, EC] PEES-1043: Symfony Scheduler - Commands not usable by @robertSt7 in #19170
  • [Bug]: Missing check if config "assets->image->thumbnails->status_cache" option is enabled/disabled by @kingjia90 in #19174
  • [Security]: Follow up regex check and add quoting to block tables by @kingjia90 in #19177
  • Statistics: fix for Studio by @brusch in #19115
  • DataObject\Listing: Add missing PhpDocs by @blankse in #18844

Full Changelog: v2026.1.4...v2026.1.5

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 12.3.9
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Task]: Add DependencyTargetsChangedMessage to Dependency Dao by @martineiber in #19156
  • [Bug, EC] PEES-1043: Symfony Scheduler - Commands not usable by @robertSt7 in #19170
  • [Bug]: Missing check if config "assets->image->thumbnails->status_cache" option is enabled/disabled by @kingjia90 in #19174
  • [Security]: Follow up regex check and add quoting to block tables by @kingjia90 in #19177
  • Statistics: fix for Studio by @brusch in #19115
  • DataObject\Listing: Add missing PhpDocs by @blankse in #18844

Full Changelog: v12.3.8...v12.3.9

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 2026.1.4
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Task]: Improve Data Object root class listing loading times by @kingjia90 in #19142
  • [Bug, EC] PEES-946: Time-Filter in Application Logs not working by @robertSt7 in #19141
  • [Security]: Enhance Class Definition security by @kingjia90 in #19145
  • Fix example in 01_Loading_Service_Definitions.md by @jdreesen in #19047

Full Changelog: v2026.1.3...v2026.1.4

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 12.3.8
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Task]: Improve Data Object root class listing loading times by @kingjia90 in #19142
  • [Bug, EC] PEES-946: Time-Filter in Application Logs not working by @robertSt7 in #19141
  • [Security]: Enhance Class Definition security by @kingjia90 in #19145
  • Fix example in 01_Loading_Service_Definitions.md by @jdreesen in #19047

Full Changelog: v12.3.7...v12.3.8

entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2026.1.4
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Grid Config] Use sharing-specific endpoints for users and roles by @markus-moser in #3596
  • Fixed topbar issue by @Corepex in #3586
  • Added cache clear tag by @Corepex in #3592
  • Added translation debug processor by @Corepex in #3546
  • Added missing error translations by @Corepex in #3601
  • Replace margin with padding by @Corepex in #3604
  • Normalize icon shape for field definition editors by @vin0401 in #3605
  • Prevent sites from overwriting the studio route by @markus-moser in #3606
  • Improve custom layout ux by @vin0401 in #3607
  • [Documents] Fix block/areablock sort drag performance by @markus-moser in #3608
  • [Dropdown] - order alphabetically by @xIrusux in #3599
  • [Filter] - ensure relation filtering does not close oroginal modal by @xIrusux in #3597
  • [Widget Trees] - add left padding by @xIrusux in #3594
  • [Data Objects][Grid][Filters] Remove advanced columns from filter add menu by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3612
  • [Classification Store] - add sorting by @xIrusux in #3600
  • Improve background loader performance by @vin0401 in #3616
  • Prepare 2025.4.4 Release by @markus-moser in #3617
  • Prepare 2026.1.4 Release by @markus-moser in #3618

Full Changelog: v2026.1.3...v2026.1.4

entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2025.4.4
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Grid Config] Use sharing-specific endpoints for users and roles by @markus-moser in #3596
  • Fixed topbar issue by @Corepex in #3586
  • Added cache clear tag by @Corepex in #3592
  • Added translation debug processor by @Corepex in #3546
  • Added missing error translations by @Corepex in #3601
  • Replace margin with padding by @Corepex in #3604
  • Normalize icon shape for field definition editors by @vin0401 in #3605
  • Prevent sites from overwriting the studio route by @markus-moser in #3606
  • Improve custom layout ux by @vin0401 in #3607
  • [Documents] Fix block/areablock sort drag performance by @markus-moser in #3608
  • [Dropdown] - order alphabetically by @xIrusux in #3599
  • [Filter] - ensure relation filtering does not close oroginal modal by @xIrusux in #3597
  • [Widget Trees] - add left padding by @xIrusux in #3594
  • [Data Objects][Grid][Filters] Remove advanced columns from filter add menu by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3612
  • [Classification Store] - add sorting by @xIrusux in #3600
  • Improve background loader performance by @vin0401 in #3616
  • Prepare 2025.4.4 Release by @markus-moser in #3617

Full Changelog: v2025.4.3...v2025.4.4

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2026.1.4
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Assets] - zip download does not include subfolders by @lukmzig in #1839
  • [Bug]: Relation-aware context for TwigTransformer. by @martineiber in #1840
  • [Bug]: Data Hub Import Log Error by @lukmzig in #1841
  • [Recycle bin] - improve error message by @lukmzig in #1844
  • [Website Settings] sorting with multiple pages only sorts active page by @lukmzig in #1843
  • [GDPR] Searching for ID 10 fails with Pimcore Users in demo by @lukmzig in #1845
  • [Widgets] default widgets from default perspective should be available in the perspective editor by @lukmzig in #1846
  • [Application Logger] File object route problem by @lukmzig in #1847
  • [Bug]: Advanced Columns do not support classification store for now. by @martineiber in #1849
  • [Advanced Columns] Support all types of Relation. by @martineiber in #1850
  • [Bug]: [Documents] Modification metadata mapping by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1852

Full Changelog: v2026.1.3...v2026.1.4

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2025.4.4
entry.summary:
https://github.com/pimcore/studio-backend-bundle/issues?q=state%3Aclosed%20milestone%3A%222025.4.4%22

What's Changed

  • [Assets] - zip download does not include subfolders by @lukmzig in #1839
  • [Bug]: Relation-aware context for TwigTransformer. by @martineiber in #1840
  • [Bug]: Data Hub Import Log Error by @lukmzig in #1841
  • [Recycle bin] - improve error message by @lukmzig in #1844
  • [Website Settings] sorting with multiple pages only sorts active page by @lukmzig in #1843
  • [GDPR] Searching for ID 10 fails with Pimcore Users in demo by @lukmzig in #1845
  • [Widgets] default widgets from default perspective should be available in the perspective editor by @lukmzig in #1846
  • [Application Logger] File object route problem by @lukmzig in #1847
  • [Bug]: Advanced Columns do not support classification store for now. by @martineiber in #1849
  • [Advanced Columns] Support all types of Relation. by @martineiber in #1850
  • [Bug]: [Documents] Modification metadata mapping by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1852

Full Changelog: v2025.4.3...v2025.4.4

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 2026.1.3
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • Rename update guide from V12 to V13 to V12 to V2026 by @jdreesen in #19105
  • Fix Pimcore version in upgrade docs by @jdreesen in #19101
  • [Security]: Improve Composite Index in ClassDefnition by @kingjia90 in #19108
  • [Security]: Add permission check for view access in Word Export TranslationController by @kingjia90 in #19112
  • [Bug, InstallBundle] Decouple InstallerKernel from MicroKernelTrait private API by @mcop1 in #19113
  • [Deprecation, Kernel] Deprecate overriding configureContainer/configureRoutes by @mcop1 in #19114
  • [Security]: Harden unserializer and refine allowed classes by @kingjia90 in #19119
  • [Security]Enhance Authorization in WebDAV MOVE via unchecked asset move handling by @kingjia90 in #19120
  • Prefer storage-reported MIME type after asset write (fallback to stream sniffing) by @vrobert78 in #18900
  • [Bug, EC] PEES-942: Improve memory usage in asset custom settings migration by @kingjia90 in #19127
  • [Bug] Error message "Cannot traverse an already closed generator" pops up when moving folder with assets by @MartaMarija in #18968
  • [Bug]: Admin translations not cleaned up in 2026 by @robertSt7 in #19130

Full Changelog: v2026.1.2...v2026.1.3

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 12.3.7
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • Rename update guide from V12 to V13 to V12 to V2026 by @jdreesen in #19105
  • Fix Pimcore version in upgrade docs by @jdreesen in #19101
  • [Security]: Improve Composite Index in ClassDefnition by @kingjia90 in #19108
  • [Security]: Add permission check for view access in Word Export TranslationController by @kingjia90 in #19112
  • [Bug, InstallBundle] Decouple InstallerKernel from MicroKernelTrait private API by @mcop1 in #19113
  • [Security]: Harden unserializer and refine allowed classes by @kingjia90 in #19119
  • [Security]Enhance Authorization in WebDAV MOVE via unchecked asset move handling by @kingjia90 in #19120
  • Prefer storage-reported MIME type after asset write (fallback to stream sniffing) by @vrobert78 in #18900
  • [Bug, EC] PEES-942: Improve memory usage in asset custom settings migration by @kingjia90 in #19127
  • [Bug] Error message "Cannot traverse an already closed generator" pops up when moving folder with assets by @MartaMarija in #18968

Full Changelog: v12.3.6...v12.3.7

entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2026.1.3
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • Prepare 2025.4.2 release by @markus-moser in #3483
  • [Rsbuild Config] Disable lazy compilation by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3480
  • Fix restore on multiple pages by @Corepex in #3388
  • Select dropdowns hidden behind WindowModal — z-index hierarchy broken in EditableDialog by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3482
  • Fixed validUnits for scoped select by @Corepex in #3398
  • "Add Areas" sidebar shows duplicate bricks when multiple areablocks exist on a page by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3490
  • Fix fallback behavior of loading screen color by @vin0401 in #3494
  • [Execution Engine] Rehydrate running jobs on page reload by @markus-moser in #3468
  • Make adding of fields from new classification stores possible by @vin0401 in #3520
  • Fix stale data display after class refresh by @vin0401 in #3530
  • Made API url configurable by @Corepex in #3529
  • [Data Object Editor] Add Many-To-Many Object Relation display mode "Tag field" by @markus-moser in #3528
  • [Data Object Editor] Respect noteditable flag inside localized fields for all data types by @markus-moser in #3533
  • Replaced manual cache clears by @Corepex in #3495
  • Updated email tab logic by @Corepex in #3489
  • Updated wrong translation by @Corepex in #3488
  • [Documents][Editmode] Deactivate clicks on renderlets by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3492
  • Renderlet editable API call drops custom config parameters by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3496
  • Harden checks for field configurations in listings by @vin0401 in #3541
  • Fix: manyToMany object relation search grid not filtering by class when no objects exist by @markus-moser in #3542
  • Add total for pagings in the classification store config by @vin0401 in #3545
  • Handle default values correctly in classificaiton store config by @vin0401 in #3547
  • Make column config for table type editable by @vin0401 in #3548
  • [Documents] No icon indication when static page generator is active by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3526
  • [ApplicationLogger] Show seconds in timestamp column by @markus-moser in #3555
  • [Data Object Editor] Fix: drag and drop relations folder to asset upload path by @markus-moser in #3557
  • [Translations] - add export, import and cleanup including import merge widget and style improvements to Translations by @xIrusux in #3497
  • [Object editor] - modification date info tab by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3556
  • [Custom Reports] - align open icon to the left and make the column size smaller to only fit the label by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3563
  • [Document Editor] Missing drop-target icon in many-to-one/many-to-many relation editable by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3564
  • Made advanced colum open per default by @Corepex in #3552
  • Added ApplicationLogger tab to object (if enabled) by @Corepex in #3560
  • Close grid config modal on cancel by @Corepex in #3554
  • [Data Object][Grid][Advanced Columns][Twig Operator] Rendering of HTML by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3567
  • Added portal-engine icon by @Corepex in #3568
  • Made column filterable by @Corepex in #3566
  • Translated selectable options in relation-editable by @Corepex in #3550
  • [Data Object Editor]: Select field 'Add options' button fix by @markus-moser in #3570
  • Add several field definition related bug fixes by @vin0401 in #3574
  • Add missing translations for class general settings by @vin0401 in #3576
  • Add css style option for field definition type text by @vin0401 in #3578
  • Fix/layout not displaying on new object brick by @benman31 in #3573
  • [Data Objects][Grid] Apply path formatters for relation columns in grid by @markus-moser in #3553
  • Add support for vbox in field containers by @vin0401 in #3580
  • [Bulk Import] Fix progress bar jumping backwards between steps by @markus-moser in #3581
  • Remove useless package archive creation step from workflow by @markus-moser in #3583
  • [Documents] Fix nested areablock duplicate toolbars regression by @markus-moser in #3584
  • Prefill field definition titles based on name by @vin0401 in #3582
  • [Data Object Editor] Use brick-fields endpoint for objectbrick class definition fieldname select by @markus-moser in #3585
  • [Workflow Dropdown] - overwrite AntD styling to remove excessive padding by @xIrusux in #3571
  • [Cache] - add Menu entry and options to clear cache in different ways by @xIrusux in #3562
  • [User and Role Workspaces] - improvements and feature additions by @xIrusux in #3589
  • Prepare 2025.4.3 release by @markus-moser in #3590
  • Prepare 2026.1.3 release by @markus-moser in #3591

New Contributors

  • @benman31 made their first contribution in #3573

Full Changelog: v2026.1.2...v2026.1.3

entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2025.4.3
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Rsbuild Config] Disable lazy compilation by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3480
  • Fix restore on multiple pages by @Corepex in #3388
  • Select dropdowns hidden behind WindowModal — z-index hierarchy broken in EditableDialog by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3482
  • Fixed validUnits for scoped select by @Corepex in #3398
  • "Add Areas" sidebar shows duplicate bricks when multiple areablocks exist on a page by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3490
  • Fix fallback behavior of loading screen color by @vin0401 in #3494
  • [Execution Engine] Rehydrate running jobs on page reload by @markus-moser in #3468
  • Make adding of fields from new classification stores possible by @vin0401 in #3520
  • Fix stale data display after class refresh by @vin0401 in #3530
  • Made API url configurable by @Corepex in #3529
  • [Data Object Editor] Add Many-To-Many Object Relation display mode "Tag field" by @markus-moser in #3528
  • [Data Object Editor] Respect noteditable flag inside localized fields for all data types by @markus-moser in #3533
  • Replaced manual cache clears by @Corepex in #3495
  • Updated email tab logic by @Corepex in #3489
  • Updated wrong translation by @Corepex in #3488
  • [Documents][Editmode] Deactivate clicks on renderlets by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3492
  • Renderlet editable API call drops custom config parameters by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3496
  • Harden checks for field configurations in listings by @vin0401 in #3541
  • Fix: manyToMany object relation search grid not filtering by class when no objects exist by @markus-moser in #3542
  • Add total for pagings in the classification store config by @vin0401 in #3545
  • Handle default values correctly in classificaiton store config by @vin0401 in #3547
  • Make column config for table type editable by @vin0401 in #3548
  • [Documents] No icon indication when static page generator is active by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3526
  • [ApplicationLogger] Show seconds in timestamp column by @markus-moser in #3555
  • [Data Object Editor] Fix: drag and drop relations folder to asset upload path by @markus-moser in #3557
  • [Translations] - add export, import and cleanup including import merge widget and style improvements to Translations by @xIrusux in #3497
  • [Object editor] - modification date info tab by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3556
  • [Custom Reports] - align open icon to the left and make the column size smaller to only fit the label by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3563
  • [Document Editor] Missing drop-target icon in many-to-one/many-to-many relation editable by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3564
  • Made advanced colum open per default by @Corepex in #3552
  • Added ApplicationLogger tab to object (if enabled) by @Corepex in #3560
  • Close grid config modal on cancel by @Corepex in #3554
  • [Data Object][Grid][Advanced Columns][Twig Operator] Rendering of HTML by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3567
  • Added portal-engine icon by @Corepex in #3568
  • Made column filterable by @Corepex in #3566
  • Translated selectable options in relation-editable by @Corepex in #3550
  • [Data Object Editor]: Select field 'Add options' button fix by @markus-moser in #3570
  • Add several field definition related bug fixes by @vin0401 in #3574
  • Add missing translations for class general settings by @vin0401 in #3576
  • Add css style option for field definition type text by @vin0401 in #3578
  • Fix/layout not displaying on new object brick by @benman31 in #3573
  • [Data Objects][Grid] Apply path formatters for relation columns in grid by @markus-moser in #3553
  • Add support for vbox in field containers by @vin0401 in #3580
  • [Bulk Import] Fix progress bar jumping backwards between steps by @markus-moser in #3581
  • Remove useless package archive creation step from workflow by @markus-moser in #3583
  • [Documents] Fix nested areablock duplicate toolbars regression by @markus-moser in #3584
  • Prefill field definition titles based on name by @vin0401 in #3582
  • [Data Object Editor] Use brick-fields endpoint for objectbrick class definition fieldname select by @markus-moser in #3585
  • [Workflow Dropdown] - overwrite AntD styling to remove excessive padding by @xIrusux in #3571
  • [Cache] - add Menu entry and options to clear cache in different ways by @xIrusux in #3562
  • [User and Role Workspaces] - improvements and feature additions by @xIrusux in #3589
  • Prepare 2025.4.3 release by @markus-moser in #3590

New Contributors

  • @benman31 made their first contribution in #3573

Full Changelog: v2025.4.2...v2025.4.3

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2026.1.3
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Feature]: Expose jobName on running-jobs API response and add distinct job names for folder operations (#3455) by @markus-moser in #1801
  • [Bug]: Override predefined_columns when set. by @martineiber in #1811
  • [Cache]: Add clear cache Endpoints. by @martineiber in #1812
  • [Bug] [Documents]: Add staticGeneratorEnabled property to Page by @martineiber in #1808
  • [Bug][Data Object Editor] null pointer exception in column collectors when layout definitions are unavailable by @markus-moser in #1822
  • [Bug]: Default unit does not auto populate for Classification Store by @lukmzig in #1823
  • [Bug]: Remove the last slash if it exists. by @martineiber in #1824
  • [Classification Store] - integrity constraint violation by @lukmzig in #1825
  • [Translation Merger ] default "line terminator" to empty space as it used to be in the old ui by @xIrusux in #1826
  • [Bug][System settings]: Localizations without fallback language lead to 500 server error by @lukmzig in #1831
  • [Bug] fix missing select options by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1818
  • Added showAppLoggerTab to endpoint by @Corepex in #1829
  • [Bug] fix objectbrick fields missing in brick assignment by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1832
  • Fix JobRun schema serializing jobRunChildId as childJobRunId by @markus-moser in #1835

Full Changelog: v2026.1.2...v2026.1.3

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2025.4.3
entry.summary:
https://github.com/pimcore/studio-backend-bundle/milestone/16?closed=1

What's Changed

  • [Feature]: Expose jobName on running-jobs API response and add distinct job names for folder operations (#3455) by @markus-moser in #1801
  • [Bug]: Override predefined_columns when set. by @martineiber in #1811
  • [Cache]: Add clear cache Endpoints. by @martineiber in #1812
  • [Bug] [Documents]: Add staticGeneratorEnabled property to Page by @martineiber in #1808
  • [Bug][Data Object Editor] null pointer exception in column collectors when layout definitions are unavailable by @markus-moser in #1822
  • [Bug]: Default unit does not auto populate for Classification Store by @lukmzig in #1823
  • [Bug]: Remove the last slash if it exists. by @martineiber in #1824

  • [Translation Merger ] default "line terminator" to empty space as it used to be in the old ui by @xIrusux in #1826

  • [Bug] fix missing select options by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1818
  • Added showAppLoggerTab to endpoint by @Corepex in #1829

Full Changelog: v2025.4.2...v2025.4.3

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 12.3.6
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Security]: Enhance SQL security in Custom Report by @kingjia90 in #19098
  • Fix Gotenberg document conversion failing for assets stored on S3 by @vrobert78 in #18899
  • [Security] Enhance Custom Report controller actions by @kingjia90 in #19099
  • Save generated object brick container class in PIMCORE_CLASS_DIRECTORY, not PIMCORE_CLASS_DEFINITION_DIRECTORY by @Jan-Walther-Basilicom in #18959
  • [Bug, EC] PEES-1103: Revert by @jcPimcore in #19104

New Contributors

  • @Jan-Walther-Basilicom made their first contribution in #18959

Full Changelog: v12.3.5...v12.3.6

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 2026.1.2
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Bug, EC] PEES-1067: Adjust log entry DateTime extraction by @jcPimcore in #19091
  • [Security]: Enhance SQL security in Custom Report by @kingjia90 in #19098
  • Fix Gotenberg document conversion failing for assets stored on S3 by @vrobert78 in #18899
  • [Security] Enhance Custom Report controller actions by @kingjia90 in #19099
  • Save generated object brick container class in PIMCORE_CLASS_DIRECTORY, not PIMCORE_CLASS_DEFINITION_DIRECTORY by @Jan-Walther-Basilicom in #18959
  • [Bug]: Add missing NO_AUTO_CACHE_CONTROL_HEADER for existing thumbnails by @vrobert78 in #19061
  • [Bug, EC] PEES-1103: Revert by @jcPimcore in #19104

New Contributors

  • @vrobert78 made their first contribution in #18899
  • @Jan-Walther-Basilicom made their first contribution in #18959

Full Changelog: v2026.1.1...v2026.1.2

entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2026.1.2
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Documents] Pass editable type id to AreablockManager by @markus-moser in #3392
  • [Bug] [Classes] Adding the configure options source to Multiselect breaks the page by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3403
  • [Data Object Editor] Preserve all localized field changes instead of only the latest by @markus-moser in #3404
  • [Classdefinitions] - names are not used for grids if title is empty by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3406
  • Add support for system fields in advaced columns by @vin0401 in #3415
  • [Assets][Prefix] Public URL field not displaying asset_prefix by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3410
  • Fix requirements for 2026.1 version in composer.json by @markus-moser in #3417
  • [Custom report] improvement configuration listing by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3419
  • [Permission Translation] - fix left over permissions by @xIrusux in #3425
  • Add robots.txt editor module with per-site editing support by @markus-moser in #3396
  • [Documents] Fix saving empty Table editable in documents by @markus-moser in #3428
  • [Grid] - ensure consistend Date formatting by @xIrusux in #3401
  • Document tree context menu hides "Add Page/Snippet/Link/Email/Hardlink" when no custom document types are configured by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3447
  • [Custom report] - add insertion for the entries within a group by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3448
  • [Classification Store] add import sort, fix refresh page behaviour and add delete icon by @xIrusux in #3439
  • [Field Definitions] - add warning for async load in admin by @xIrusux in #3446
  • [Class Definitions] save delete function by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3458
  • [Documents] Use as site modal rendering performance problem by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3456
  • [Documents] Fix translation API request fires too early on document open by @markus-moser in #3461
  • [Data Object Editor] fix: show inherited state and localized values in many-to-many object relation by @markus-moser in #3424
  • [Tag]: Hide tag filter sidebar tab without tags_search permission by @markus-moser in #3462
  • [Object editor] - modification date info tab by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3463
  • Tag drag-and-drop in configuration view doesn't work — allowDrop not set on tree nodes by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3466
  • [Tag Filtering] - Add Search by @xIrusux in #3459
  • Added sortfilter for id to list call by @Corepex in #3469
  • Fixed element open issue by @Corepex in #3467
  • [Grid] hide tag search if permission not there by @xIrusux in #3465
  • [Grid] update tag selection in grid after deleting an item by @xIrusux in #3464
  • [Redirects] improve options loading by @xIrusux in #3472
  • Add background loading animation during app loading by @vin0401 in #3476
  • Add blur for twig loader by @vin0401 in #3481
  • Prepare 2026.1.2 release by @markus-moser in #3484

Full Changelog: v2026.1.1...v2026.1.2

entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2025.4.2
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Documents] Pass editable type id to AreablockManager by @markus-moser in #3392
  • [Bug] [Classes] Adding the configure options source to Multiselect breaks the page by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3403
  • [Data Object Editor] Preserve all localized field changes instead of only the latest by @markus-moser in #3404
  • [Classdefinitions] - names are not used for grids if title is empty by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3406
  • Add support for system fields in advaced columns by @vin0401 in #3415
  • [Assets][Prefix] Public URL field not displaying asset_prefix by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3410
  • [Custom report] improvement configuration listing by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3419
  • [Permission Translation] - fix left over permissions by @xIrusux in #3425
  • Add robots.txt editor module with per-site editing support by @markus-moser in #3396
  • [Documents] Fix saving empty Table editable in documents by @markus-moser in #3428
  • [Grid] - ensure consistend Date formatting by @xIrusux in #3401
  • Document tree context menu hides "Add Page/Snippet/Link/Email/Hardlink" when no custom document types are configured by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3447
  • [Custom report] - add insertion for the entries within a group by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3448
  • [Classification Store] add import sort, fix refresh page behaviour and add delete icon by @xIrusux in #3439
  • [Field Definitions] - add warning for async load in admin by @xIrusux in #3446
  • [Class Definitions] save delete function by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3458
  • [Documents] Use as site modal rendering performance problem by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3456
  • [Documents] Fix translation API request fires too early on document open by @markus-moser in #3461
  • [Data Object Editor] fix: show inherited state and localized values in many-to-many object relation by @markus-moser in #3424
  • [Tag]: Hide tag filter sidebar tab without tags_search permission by @markus-moser in #3462
  • [Object editor] - modification date info tab by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3463
  • Tag drag-and-drop in configuration view doesn't work — allowDrop not set on tree nodes by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3466
  • [Tag Filtering] - Add Search by @xIrusux in #3459
  • Added sortfilter for id to list call by @Corepex in #3469
  • Fixed element open issue by @Corepex in #3467
  • [Grid] hide tag search if permission not there by @xIrusux in #3465
  • [Grid] update tag selection in grid after deleting an item by @xIrusux in #3464
  • [Redirects] improve options loading by @xIrusux in #3472
  • Add background loading animation during app loading by @vin0401 in #3476
  • Add blur for twig loader by @vin0401 in #3481
  • Prepare 2025.4.2 release by @markus-moser in #3483

Full Changelog: v2025.4.1...v2025.4.2

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2026.1.2
entry.summary:
https://github.com/pimcore/studio-backend-bundle/milestone/17?closed=1

What's Changed

  • [Predefined Asset Metadata] - empty object, asset, document fields disappear after saving by @lukmzig in #1781
  • [Assets][Prefix] Public URL field not displaying asset_prefix by @lukmzig in #1782
  • [Tag]: Incorrect permission check in tags by @lukmzig in #1785
  • Add robotsTxt perspective permission to SEO context permissions by @markus-moser in #1786
  • [Bug]: Download of big amount of data object fails by @lukmzig in #1790
  • [Data Object Grid] Respect fallback languages for localized fields by @markus-moser in #1787
  • [Recycle bin] - restore of selection does not work correct by @lukmzig in #1795
  • [Tag]: Allow tags_search permission on GET tag endpoints by @markus-moser in #1796
  • [Bug] text-layout-preview called incorrectly by preview in Text when class definition name starts with lower case by @fashxp in #1791
  • [Bug]: Use Studio Type. by @martineiber in #1798
  • [Bug]: Fix various order by. by @martineiber in #1797
  • [Bug]: Classification Store unable to rename due to Description is NULL by @lukmzig in #1803
  • [Bug] Fix Symfony env var tracking for mercure_settings in prepend() by @vrobert78 in #1807

Full Changelog: v2026.1.1...v2026.1.2

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2025.4.2
entry.summary:
https://github.com/pimcore/studio-backend-bundle/milestone/15?closed=1

  • [Predefined Asset Metadata] - empty object, asset, document fields disappear after saving by @lukmzig in #1781

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 2026.1.1
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Task] Refine upgrade notes for installer profile-based architecture by @mcop1 in #19072
  • [Bug] Load startup.php when booting the real kernel during installation by @mcop1 in #19077
  • [Task] Update PHPunit and Codeception by @jcPimcore in #19080
  • Chore/fix php cs fixer workflow by @berfinyuksel in #19087
  • Fix: quote fields in SQL adapter by @robertSt7 in #19089

Full Changelog: v2026.1.0...v2026.1.1

entry.title: Release notes from pimcore: 12.3.5
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • [Task] Update PHPunit and Codeception by @jcPimcore in #19080
  • Chore/fix php cs fixer workflow by @berfinyuksel in #19087
  • Fix: quote fields in SQL adapter by @robertSt7 in #19089

Full Changelog: v12.3.4...v12.3.5

entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2026.1.1
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • Add binary and merge=ours strategy for frontend build files by @herbertroth in #3340
  • Add binary and merge strategy for frontend build files (#3340) by @herbertroth in #3341
  • Fix empty area settings dialog for flat editable dialog items by @markus-moser in #3343
  • [Data Object][Grid] PQL filter errors are not shown ... but silently dropped by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3329
  • Fix iframe translation key handling by @markus-moser in #3348
  • Fix image proportional dimensions for image data type by @markus-moser in #3350
  • [Widget Editor] Allowed objects also visible when type asset or document selected by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3309
  • [Tag Management] Selecting and removing tags has some issues by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3331
  • Create CONTRIBUTING.md by @markus-moser in #3361
  • [Task] Update PHPunit and Codeception by @jcPimcore in #3360
  • Fixed language flag issue by @Corepex in #3313
  • Changed translation key by @Corepex in #3314
  • Added priority translation to detail modal by @Corepex in #3321
  • Added onFinish callback to config create by @Corepex in #3328
  • Added invalidateTag on creation by @Corepex in #3332
  • Fix tab close activating first tab instead of next tab by @markus-moser in #3362
  • Fixed reload issue in select-options by @Corepex in #3320
  • Remove redundant layout fieldset panel from relation field types by @markus-moser in #3364
  • Fix CONTRIBUTING.md by @markus-moser in #3365
  • [Maintenance]: Add bundle permission translations by @xIrusux in #3366
  • Upstream merge to 2026.1 by @markus-moser in #3346
  • [Asset] upload image version - Tree preview not updated fix by @markus-moser in #3369
  • [DataObject][AdvancedManyToManyObjectRelation] Reordering Advanced Objects Freezes UI by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3375
  • [Execution Engine] Refactor step/progress tracking and fix progress bar bugs by @markus-moser in #3192
  • Added api filter to table by @Corepex in #3324
  • Added context menu to config tabs by @Corepex in #3330
  • Added csv edit modal by @Corepex in #3351
  • Added send via notification feature by @Corepex in #3359
  • [Assets][PublicURL] Public URL field missing in Full info modal for asset documents by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3376
  • Fixed sortingFilter param in gdpr extractor by @Corepex in #3333
  • [Data Object Tree] Layout endpoint called when opening a folder by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3379
  • Prepared search column filter by @Corepex in #3354
  • FIxed mismatched translation keys for Perspectives Editor by @vmalyk in #3327
  • [Documents] Enable search in document select/multiselect editables by keeping label as string by @daniel-travix in #3357
  • [Versions] Fix layout for many-to-* relation fields by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3381
  • Applied translations for " Permissions Bundles" by @vmalyk in #3378
  • [Import Modal] Implement multiple file import by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3334
  • Prevent Button collapsing to 0x0 when loading starts before first paint by @markus-moser in #3386
  • [Versions] Incorrect behavior of selected/unselected items by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3391
  • [Task] Update PHPUnit and Codeception by @jcPimcore in #3397
  • [Notes and Events] - fix refresh behaviour by @xIrusux in #3393
  • [Website Settings] - Sorting columns by @xIrusux in #3395
  • [User Management] - allow saving dO and document folders in role workspaces without further configuration by @xIrusux in #3394
  • Prepare 2026.1.1 release by @markus-moser in #3399

New Contributors

  • @jcPimcore made their first contribution in #3360
  • @vmalyk made their first contribution in #3327
  • @daniel-travix made their first contribution in #3357

Full Changelog: v2026.1.0...v2026.1.1

entry.title: Release notes from studio-ui-bundle: 2025.4.1
entry.summary:
What's Changed

  • Add binary and merge=ours strategy for frontend build files by @herbertroth in #3340
  • Fix empty area settings dialog for flat editable dialog items by @markus-moser in #3343
  • [Data Object][Grid] PQL filter errors are not shown ... but silently dropped by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3329
  • Fix iframe translation key handling by @markus-moser in #3348
  • Fix image proportional dimensions for image data type by @markus-moser in #3350
  • [Widget Editor] Allowed objects also visible when type asset or document selected by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3309
  • [Tag Management] Selecting and removing tags has some issues by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3331
  • Create CONTRIBUTING.md by @markus-moser in #3361
  • [Task] Update PHPunit and Codeception by @jcPimcore in #3360
  • Fixed language flag issue by @Corepex in #3313
  • Changed translation key by @Corepex in #3314
  • Added priority translation to detail modal by @Corepex in #3321
  • Added onFinish callback to config create by @Corepex in #3328
  • Added invalidateTag on creation by @Corepex in #3332
  • Fix tab close activating first tab instead of next tab by @markus-moser in #3362
  • Fixed reload issue in select-options by @Corepex in #3320
  • Remove redundant layout fieldset panel from relation field types by @markus-moser in #3364
  • Fix CONTRIBUTING.md by @markus-moser in #3365
  • [Maintenance]: Add bundle permission translations by @xIrusux in #3366
  • [Asset] upload image version - Tree preview not updated fix by @markus-moser in #3369
  • [DataObject][AdvancedManyToManyObjectRelation] Reordering Advanced Objects Freezes UI by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3375
  • [Execution Engine] Refactor step/progress tracking and fix progress bar bugs by @markus-moser in #3192
  • Added api filter to table by @Corepex in #3324
  • Added context menu to config tabs by @Corepex in #3330
  • Added csv edit modal by @Corepex in #3351
  • Added send via notification feature by @Corepex in #3359
  • [Assets][PublicURL] Public URL field missing in Full info modal for asset documents by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3376
  • Fixed sortingFilter param in gdpr extractor by @Corepex in #3333
  • [Data Object Tree] Layout endpoint called when opening a folder by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3379
  • Prepared search column filter by @Corepex in #3354
  • FIxed mismatched translation keys for Perspectives Editor by @vmalyk in #3327
  • [Documents] Enable search in document select/multiselect editables by keeping label as string by @daniel-travix in #3357
  • [Versions] Fix layout for many-to-* relation fields by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3381
  • Applied translations for " Permissions Bundles" by @vmalyk in #3378
  • [Import Modal] Implement multiple file import by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3334
  • Prevent Button collapsing to 0x0 when loading starts before first paint by @markus-moser in #3386
  • [Versions] Incorrect behavior of selected/unselected items by @ValeriaMaltseva in #3391
  • [Notes and Events] - fix refresh behaviour by @xIrusux in #3393
  • [Website Settings] - Sorting columns by @xIrusux in #3395
  • [User Management] - allow saving dO and document folders in role workspaces without further configuration by @xIrusux in #3394

New Contributors

  • @vmalyk made their first contribution in #3327
  • @daniel-travix made their first contribution in #3357

Full Changelog: v2025.4.0...v2025.4.1

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2026.1.1
entry.summary:
https://github.com/pimcore/studio-backend-bundle/milestone/13?closed=1

What's Changed

  • [Bug][Documents]: Save does not purge orphaned editables from removed area brick entries by @lukmzig in #1753
  • [Select options] - configuration should not be editable for non admins if 'admin only' set to true by @lukmzig in #1754
  • [Bug] Update field definition retrieval in LocalizedFieldService by @martineiber in #1756
  • [Bug]: Exception after opening class which has no owner by @lukmzig in #1758
  • [Documents]: Improve translation error key by @lukmzig in #1759
  • [DataObjects] localized fields sometimes missing fields for empty data by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1766
  • [Task] Update PHPunit and Codeception by @jcPimcore in #1763
  • [Task] Add Contributing md by @martineiber in #1769
  • [QuantityValues] Implement search column filter by @lukmzig in #1765
  • [DataObjects][Calculated Values] getCalculatedValueForEditMode not considered by @martineiber in #1764
  • [Execution Engine] Batch edit all assets fails with a lot of items by @lukmzig in #1557
  • [Task] Add mercure host resolution fallback by @martineiber in #1770
  • [DataObjects] [Search] fix missing localized fields in search preview by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1776
  • [Task] Remove fallback for Mercure server. by @martineiber in #1778
  • [Custom Reports]: Make element_type and element_class_id optional in CsvCreationHandler by @markus-moser in #1773
  • [Task]: Admin translations in studio by @lukmzig in #1771
  • [Translation]: Only studio domain is not FE domain by @lukmzig in #1780

Full Changelog: v2026.1.0...v2026.1.1

entry.title: Release notes from studio-backend-bundle: 2025.4.1
entry.summary:
https://github.com/pimcore/studio-backend-bundle/milestone/12?closed=1

What's Changed

  • [Bug][Documents]: Save does not purge orphaned editables from removed area brick entries by @lukmzig in #1753
  • [Select options] - configuration should not be editable for non admins if 'admin only' set to true by @lukmzig in #1754
  • [Bug] Update field definition retrieval in LocalizedFieldService by @martineiber in #1756
  • [Bug]: Exception after opening class which has no owner by @lukmzig in #1758
  • [Documents]: Improve translation error key by @lukmzig in #1759
  • [DataObjects] localized fields sometimes missing fields for empty data by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1766
  • [Task] Update PHPunit and Codeception by @jcPimcore in #1763
  • [Task] Add Contributing md by @martineiber in #1769
  • [QuantityValues] Implement search column filter by @lukmzig in #1765
  • [DataObjects][Calculated Values] getCalculatedValueForEditMode not considered by @martineiber in #1764
  • [Execution Engine] Batch edit all assets fails with a lot of items by @lukmzig in #1557
  • [Task] Add mercure host resolution fallback by @martineiber in #1770
  • [DataObjects] [Search] fix missing localized fields in search preview by @wwidergoldpimcore in #1776
  • [Task] Remove fallback for Mercure server. by @martineiber in #1778
  • [Custom Reports]: Make element_type and element_class_id optional in CsvCreationHandler by @markus-moser in #1773
  • [Task]: Admin translations in studio by @lukmzig in #1771

Full Changelog: v2025.4.0...v2025.4.1
